scripts.deploy:pages: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name lightweaver
scripts.pages:project: wrangler pages project create lightweaver --production-branch main
scripts.pi:start: npm run build && npm run serve:pi
scripts.test:core: node tests/project-frame-audit.mjs && node tests/ai-pattern-server.mjs && node tests/wled-control-contract.mjs && node tests/rotary-pattern-cycle.mjs && node tests/usb-rotary-input.mjs && node tests/preview-fallback-strip.mjs && node tests/control-scale.mjs && node tests/pattern-targeting.mjs && node tests/usb-led-frame.mjs && node tests/usb-led-color-order.mjs && node tests/usb-led-status-polling.mjs && node tests/usb-led-controller.mjs && node tests/usb-led-config.mjs && node tests/card-runtime-contract.mjs && node tests/card-pattern-bank.mjs && node tests/card-live-preview.mjs && node tests/card-installer-package.mjs && node tests/card-connection-mode.mjs && node ../firmware/lightweaver-controller/tests/rotary-direction.mjs && node ../firmware/lightweaver-controller/tests/storage-stack-safety.mjs && node ../firmware/lightweaver-controller/tests/pattern-color-modifiers.mjs
scripts.test:ai: npm run test:server && npm run test:core && npx playwright test tests/ai-pattern-assistant.spec.ts
